300.name: Button Eyes
300.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Fear.

306.name: Confusing Eyes
306.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Confusion 3.

311.name: gecko eye
311.desc: You do not take extra damage from backstabs.

313.name: Issac's Eyes
313.desc: Your basic attack creates water tiles.

314.name: Dead Eyes
314.desc: When you are downed, spawn 3 Flies. +2 corpse health.

316.name: Lightning eyes
316.desc: 15% chance to counter attack with Chain Lightning when you get hit.

317.name: Dice Eyes
317.desc: Gain a random stat up at the end of each turn.

318.name: Goat Eyes
318.desc: You can see hidden things. +1 Knockback damage.

326.name: 4 Eyes
326.desc: Gain 2 Charge each time you cast 4 spells.

329.name: Spinning Eyes
329.desc: Your basic attack has a 15% chance to inflict Confusion.

331.name: Glassy Eyes
331.desc: At the start of each battle, gain a random temporary pill if your trinket slot is empty.

332.name: Bleeding Eyes
332.desc: Start each battle Bleeding. Gain 1 Charge each time you take damage.

334.name: Infested Eyes
334.desc: Blind. Spawn a Flea when you take damage.

335.name: Fake Eyelashes
335.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to Charm.

336.name: Bolt Eyes
336.desc: Your basic attack is electric element and has a 5% chance to stun.

337.name: Ice Eyes
337.desc: Your basic attack is ice element and inflicts Slow.

339.name: Water Eyes
339.desc: +1 Health Regeneration while wet. Your basic attack is water element.

341.name: Flower Eyes
341.desc: Gain Charge 1 the first time you move each turn.

342.name: Poison Eyes
342.desc: Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1. Start each battle Poisoned.

343.name: Clown Eyes
343.desc: You have a 5% chance to inflict Fear on units who contact or attack you.

344.name: Sun Eyes
344.desc: You have a 10% chance to Blind units who contact or attack you.

345.name: Evil Eyes
345.desc: Inflict a random debuff on units who contact you.

347.name: Hypno Eyes
347.desc: Your basic attack has a 15% chance to inflict Confusion 2.

349.name: 8 Eyes
349.desc: Emit 4 Sparkles each time you cast 8 spells.

351.name: Chaos Eyes
351.desc: Your bonus ability is a different random spell each battle.

352.name: Runny Mascara
352.desc: You have All Stats Up while Bleeding.

353.name: Chameleon Eyes
353.desc: You take no extra damage from backstabs.

754.name: alien eyes
754.desc: +1 range. Your basic attack is gravity element.

755.name: mothman eyes
755.desc: Your basic attack has a 15% chance to inflict Fear.

900.name: slender
900.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Slow.

-2.name: no eyes (frame 703, but completely missing parts are special and keyed in on -2)
